description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish documentation that runs on push to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of two ubuntu-latest jobs: update-cli-screenshots and publish-documentation. The first job checks out the repository with a personal access token, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies with poetry, updates CLI screenshots, and commits and pushes the changes. The second job depends on the first, checks out the repository again, pulls the latest changes, sets up Python 3.x, installs documentation dependencies, generates sponsors, builds documentation with poetry, and deploys it to a gh-pages branch using a GitHub Pages deploy action.
